dataManagement.title: Data Management
dataManagement.resetDescription: Delete locally cached data and re-sync from the server. This does not affect your data on the server.
dataManagement.resetConfirmDescription: All locally cached data will be deleted. The latest data will be re-synced from the server. This does not affect your data on the server.
